# 📤 Submissions Directory

This directory stores the generated predictions that are formatted and ready to upload to the EY AI & Data Challenge platform.

## 📁 Directory Contents

* **`submission_v1.csv`**: Baseline/Benchmark model predictions for the validation set.
* **`submission_v2.csv`**: Enhanced predictions generated by applying feature engineering and optimized models.

## ⚠️ Submission Guidelines
Ensure all submission files are in CSV format and match the layout of `data/raw/submission_template.csv` with exactly:
- `Latitude`
- `Longitude`
- `Sample Date`
- `Total Alkalinity` (Predicted)
- `Electrical Conductance` (Predicted)
- `Dissolved Reactive Phosphorus` (Predicted)
